commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a best-effort usageState payload to reply_payload_sending, records per-turn model/usage/identity/limit data in the reply runner, and adds a cached provider-limit resolver with tests.

PR surface: Source +375, Tests +86. Total +461 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review defects from source inspection: current metadata records auth-profile as a mechanism, and the PR falls back by sessionKey without deleting usageState entries. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Two narrow code/test blockers are concrete enough for an automated repair before maintainer review resumes.
